channel.title: Q-Learning on Jubzinas | AI & Blockchain
channel.description: Recent content in Q-Learning on Jubzinas | AI & Blockchain

item.title: Q-Learning: Teaching Machines to Make Decisions
item.description:
Q-Learning is one of the most fundamental algorithms in Reinforcement Learning. It allows an agent to learn the optimal strategy for navigating an environment purely through trial and error — no model of the world required.

Think of it like a traveler exploring a city without a map. Every time they find a shortcut or hit a dead end, they update their mental notes. Over time, those notes become a reliable guide to reaching any destination as efficiently as possible.
